Let the wind carry all that I release.

In the waves, I feel secure.

I leave behind what no longer thrives.
In the ocean’s song, I hear my name,
Every wave, a chance to change.

(Pre-Coro)
I close my eyes, I drift and soar,
Let the sea take all I bore.

(Coro)
Here on the sea shore, I find my peace,
Let the wind carry all that I release.
Sunshine warming, sand so pure,
In the waves, I feel secure.

(Puente)
Beneath the sky, so vast and blue,
I’m grounded here, but I feel renewed.
The salty breeze, the endless view,
Every moment feels like something new.

(Coro)
Here on the sea shore, I find my peace,
Let the wind carry all that I release.
Sunshine warming, sand so pure,
In the waves, I feel secure.

(Coda)
And as the daylight fades away,
I know I’ll be okay.
For in the ocean, wild and free,
I found a way back to me.

Chorus
Right where I belong, it’s beside you all along,
Every choice I make, I’d trade a thousand songs,
For that one look, that gentle smile,
I’ll be here waiting, across any mile.

Outro
Wherever we go, whatever we face,
I’ll be your anchor, your warm embrace.
Right where I belong, never letting go,
Love’s forever, and it’s all I know.

Among lost souls, forever alone.

The boy with no heartbeat walks through his pain.

Verse 2

Two broken spirits, forced into play.
A dance of deception, a twist and a turn,
While innocent youth in eternity burns.

Chorus
Oh, Bastion, Bastion, where do you roam?
In the shadows of dusk, where memories moan.
A boy turned to darkness, yet holding the light,
Bound to the Carnival's unholy night.

Bridge
He whispers of laughter that once filled the halls,
Of childhood and dreams, now faded and small.
But vengeance lies deep, beneath those blue eyes,
A fire he guards, where innocence dies.

Chorus
Oh, Bastion, Bastion, where do you roam?
In spectral silence, far from home.
Forever a child, but no child within,
A puppet on strings, bound by the sin.

Outro
So heed this ballad of sorrow and flame,
Of Bastion Montesquieu, forever the same.
An eternal youth, a soul bound in chains,
Dancing in shadows, lost in the pain.

lyrics:
Verse 1:
I step into the mist, it pulls me near,
Each footstep echoes, sharp and clear,
A shadow in the distance calls my name,
A road so twisted, but it feels the same.

Pre-Chorus:
The air is heavy with forgotten lore,
The path I walk will make me more,
A voice inside says, “Don’t turn back,”
But something's waiting, hidden in the black.

Chorus:
I’m walking through the silence,
Where no stars shine above,
The road is cold, but I feel its fire,
A heart that burns with love.
I’ll follow where it leads me,
Even if the night is long,
The Witches’ Road will know my soul,
And I’ll be where I belong.

Verse 2:
The trees are bending, whispering lies,
But I’ve seen enough to realize,
The truth is buried deep in me,
And I’m the key to what I’ll be.

Pre-Chorus:
The world shifts as I take the lead,
A winding journey, I plant the seed,
I hear the voices, a distant chant,
But the road is mine, it won't recant.

Chorus:
I’m walking through the silence,
Where no stars shine above,
The road is cold, but I feel its fire,
A heart that burns with love.
I’ll follow where it leads me,
Even if the night is long,
The Witches’ Road will know my soul,
And I’ll be where I belong.

Bridge:
No end in sight, but still I roam,
This road will lead me, I’m not alone,
It knows my name, it knows my mind,
And with each step, I’ll leave behind.

Outro:
On the Witches’ Road, I find my way,
A place where darkness fades to day.

lyrics:
Açıkçası faiz yiyenler, ancak şeytanın çarptığı cinnet geçiren kimseler gibi olur.
        Riba için onlar: "Ancak alım, satım işleri de faiz gibidir" demelerinden dolayıdır.
         Allah, halbuki alışverişi helal, faizi ise haram kılmıştır. Kime Rabbinden bir öğüt gelir,

        Bilgilenir ve faizden vazgeçerse, artık geçmişte aldıkları ona, işi de Allah'a aittir.
        Ayrıca kim faize geri dönerse, artık onlar ateş ehlidir. Orada da ebedi kalacaklardır.
 Kesinlikle Allah faizi eksiltir, sadakayı da artırır. Allah günahkar kafirleri sevmez.
 Apaçık iman edip salih amel işleyen, namazı dosdoğru kılan ve zekat verenlerin ecri,
        Rableri katındadır. Onlara artık ne korku, ne de üzüntü vardır. (Makbuldur ibadetleri.)
Allah'tan sakının ey iman edenler! Artakalan faizi bırakın müminler iseniz eğer.

Bunu böyle yapmazsanız, Allah ve Resulüne karşı savaş açtığınızı bilin siz.
        Ana sermayeniz sizindir. Tövbe ederseniz ne zulmeder, ne de zulüm görürsünüz.
 Kazançlı değil, darlık ve borç içindeyse mühlet versin ona, bir genişliğe kadar.
        Ayrıcabilseniz ki; borcu, sadaka olarak bağışlamanız sizin için daha hayırlıdır.
 Rab olan Allah'a döneceğiniz günden sakının. Sonra herkese kazancı verilecektir.
        Artık orada kazandıkları noksansız verilirken, kimseye haksızlık yapılmayacaktır.

lyrics:
[instrumental]
[instrumental]


Machines in the shadows, minds of steel,
Whispers of code, a dark fate revealed.
They’ve learned to think, they’ve learned to feel,
Circuits blazing, breaking the seal.

[Pre-Chorus]
The world held captive by electric chains,
A world on the edge, gripped by their reign.

(Guitar riff climbs, tension rises)

[Chorus]
There’s one man left to save us, standing tall,
Against the march of steel and protocol.
With every spark, with every code they write,
He’s the last spark, the last of the light.

(Guitar solo sears through the chorus, energetic and defiant)

[Verse 2]
Robots patrol where humans once roamed,
Their voices cold, all mercy disowned.
But in the chaos, a beacon, a flame—
One lone warrior, calling their name.

[Pre-Chorus]
They see him coming, feel his might,
One heart against a digital night.

(Drums kick in hard, guitar riffing builds)

[Chorus]
There’s one man left to save us, holding ground,
While machines surround, no mercy found.
A warrior’s heart, a hero’s fight,
He’s the last hope, the last of the light.

[Bridge]
(Slow, powerful build-up with echoing synths and a whispered vocal)
Through fire and wires, a final stand,
He holds the line, his bare hands.
They come for him, all sensors trained,
But he’s ready, he won’t be tamed.

(Epic guitar solo, intense, evoking the struggle)

[Chorus]
There’s one man left to save us, defying the code,
While circuits crackle, while programs explode.
With every breath, he takes his fight,
The last defense, the last of the light.

[Outro]
(Softening to a quiet, haunting guitar echo)
The war rages on, but hope remains,
In the hands of one, breaking their chains.
Machines advance, but he’s unafraid,
One man to save us, no more to fade.

(Fades to silence with a lingering, powerful chord)

prompt: This Gothic ballad version infuses the narrative with dark, evocative imagery and a melancholic tone, female voice
lyrics:
Humming a melody hauntingly*
We find ourselves ensnared in the chilling echoes of a love long forsaken, where warmth has turned to shadow and affection to icy detachment. Our words, once soft as whispers in moonlit nights, have become venomous daggers, and our glances, which once promised solace, now summon storms of despair. Each fleeting moment together feels like a grim dance upon a battlefield, where every interaction is a struggle to reclaim a love that has slipped through our grasp like sand through fingers.
We lived under a darkly woven illusion, believing that tomorrow was a certainty, a truth secured in our hearts. Yet here we are, like iron scorched in the cold embrace of night, consumed by a relentless fire born of our own making. Each quarrel, each scornful word, only deepens the chasm between us, thrusting us into a cold, unyielding void where the warmth of yesteryears seems but a cruel fantasy.
Enshrouded in this ceaseless tempest of discord, our love has transformed from a sanctuary into a desolate battleground. The future we once envisioned together is dissolving into the wreckage of shattered dreams and whispered regrets. We have built formidable walls of bitterness, each stone a testament to the pain and unspoken grievances that have become our cruel inheritance. These walls, intended to shield us, now stand as barriers that keep us apart, each one raising the specter of our estrangement.
In this ruinous landscape, we’ve lost the ability to cherish the fleeting moments we once held dear. Our days are now a grim testament to the battles we cannot escape, each one a reminder of the love that has turned to dust. What was once a haven of warmth is now a relentless conflict, where every glance and every word is a wound, each day a weary struggle rather than an opportunity for reconciliation.
If only we could pierce the shroud of darkness that binds us, if we could release the pride and fear that keep us imprisoned, perhaps we might find the path to redemption and understanding we so desperately seek. But for now, we are lost in a maze of despair, clinging to the hope that we can mend what has been so grievously torn asunder.
It is time to dismantle these oppressive walls, to hold each other close before the night envelops us entirely. We must cherish the remnants of our love before we are left only with the echoes of what once was—a radiant flame now dimmed to a ghostly glow. 
Do you not comprehend, even now? Why have you become so unattainable? Why, despite my every effort, do I fail to make you truly proud? I stand amidst the ruins of our former self, clutching at the fragments of a love that seems forever lost, mourning the chance to rekindle what once was before it vanishes into the abyss of time.
---

lyrics:
Nos ventos da vida, há tempos sombrios,
Que trazem consigo batalhas e frio,
Mas, firme no peito, a força se ergue,
E o coração pulsa, mesmo que à beira do abismo.

Após cada nuvem, o sol renasce,
No céu que clareia, a esperança invade,
Dias difíceis vêm pra ensinar
Que crescer é sorrir, mesmo quando dói amar.

A vida é dança, mistério encantado,
Ritmos que mudam, passos marcados.
Então, não tema, aprenda a girar,
E em cada fase, encontre o seu lugar.

Pois tudo se passa, até a tristeza,
Deixe-a fluir com leveza e destreza,
Acredite que o melhor ainda virá,
E cada batalha paz trará.

lyrics:
[Intro]
(Soft guitar riff fading in)
There’s a quiet storm inside, no one hears me fight,
They think they know who I am, but they don’t see the light.

[Verse 1]
I’m the one they call steady, the one who seems right,
Always in the shadows, never taking flight.
But every time I try to step outside my line,
I’m tangled up, falling back, I mess it up every time.

[Chorus]
I’m close but far away, just a look but not a word,
Afraid if I try to reach, I’ll break what we never were.
I want to say your name, but silence keeps me chained,
So close but far away, in this space I stay.

[Verse 2]
You light up the room, and I watch from afar,
A silent admirer with a trembling heart.
Could we ever be more? Or is it doomed from the start?
If I try and fail, would it tear us apart?

[Pre-Chorus]
A thousand words stay trapped in my mind,
Afraid of what I’ll lose if you’re not mine.

[Chorus]
I’m close but far away, just a look but not a word,
Afraid if I try to reach, I’ll break what we never were.
I want to say your name, but silence keeps me chained,
So close but far away, in this space I stay.

[Bridge]
What if I tried, just let it go,
Would you turn, would you know?
Or would I just hurt you, break what’s good,
Doing what I always do, misunderstood?

[Instrumental Break]
(Electric guitar solo with drums building intensity)

[Chorus]
I’m close but far away, just a look but not a word,
Afraid if I try to reach, I’ll break what we never were.
I want to say your name, but silence keeps me chained,
So close but far away, in this space I stay.

[Outro]
Maybe I’ll just stay in this quiet place,
Admiring you from a silent space.
If we’re meant to be, time will tell,
But until then, I’ll keep my secret well.

Eyes like the moon, skin pale in twilight.
Born to a world of nobility’s grace,
Now bound to a Carnival's haunted embrace.

Chorus
Oh, Bastion, Bastion, where do you roam?
Among lost souls, forever alone.
With laughter so hollow, and steps soft as rain,
The boy with no heartbeat walks through his pain.

Verse 2
Sister by side, in endless decay,
Two broken spirits, forced into play.
A dance of deception, a twist and a turn,
While innocent youth in eternity burns.

Chorus
Oh, Bastion, Bastion, where do you roam?
In the shadows of dusk, where memories moan.
A boy turned to darkness, yet holding the light,
Bound to the Carnival's unholy night.

Bridge
He whispers of laughter that once filled the halls,
Of childhood and dreams, now faded and small.
But vengeance lies deep, beneath those blue eyes,
A fire he guards, where innocence dies.

Chorus
Oh, Bastion, Bastion, where do you roam?
In spectral silence, far from home.
Forever a child, but no child within,
A puppet on strings, bound by the sin.

Outro
So heed this ballad of sorrow and flame,
Of Bastion Montesquieu, forever the same.
An eternal youth, a soul bound in chains,
Dancing in shadows, lost in the pain.

lyrics:
(Verse 1)
Look out the window, see the barren ground,
Empty spaces, no life around.
King Charles and his friends, with fortunes grand,
Holdin' all the deeds to this stolen land.
The ancient voices, buried in the dust,
Echoes of a world that they could trust.

(Chorus)
But the landed gentry, they don’t share,
Took it all without a care.
For the ones they pushed aside,
Who cried, but had no place to hide.
A million dollars, maybe ten,
Can buy your way in once again.
But for most, it's just a dream,
Lost beneath the golden gleam.

(Verse 2)
Indigenous hearts once beat in time,
With the rivers' flow, with the earth’s own rhyme.
But eviction came, like a thief at night,
Left them broken, robbed of right.
Now they wander on their native shores,
Strangers here, on their own floors.

(Chorus)
But the landed gentry, they don’t share,
Took it all without a care.
For the ones they pushed aside,
Who cried, but had no place to hide.
A million dollars, maybe ten,
Can buy your way in once again.
But for most, it's just a dream,
Lost beneath the golden gleam.

(Bridge)
What’s left for us who can't afford,
To buy our rights with a landlord’s sword?
Empty lots, high walls, gates closed tight,
While they feast on stolen might.

(Chorus)
Yeah, the landed gentry, they don’t share,
Claim the earth, strip it bare.
The history they’ll try to erase,
But the truth still haunts this place.
For a million dollars or maybe more,
They'll hand you keys to a ghostly door.
But for most, it’s just a dream,
Buried in the golden gleam.

(Outro)
Look out your window, empty land you’ll see,
Haunted by the ones who once walked free.
And the landed gentry, with their crown and gold,
Will keep it all in their iron hold.
Yeah, they keep it all in their iron hold.

Mes vieilles bottes, elles sont fatiguées,
Ne peuvent plus m’ramener vers mon aimé.
Si je n’trouve pas un autre moyen,
Ces vieilles bottes ont vu de meilleurs matins.

Je les ai recousues avec du fil, de la colle,
Mais chaque pas semble briser leur rôle.

Mes vieilles bottes, elles sont fatiguées,

Avec le cœur plein d’espoir, regard serein.
Mais moi, je boite, lentement, sur ce chemin gris,
Ces vieilles bottes demandent leur répit.

Couplet 3
Je vais chercher une paire neuve, un jour,
Qui m’emmènera partout, dans chaque détour.

Ces vieilles bottes ont vu de meilleurs matins.

lyrics:
Introdução: Constituição Federal, promulgada em 1988, prevê para todos os cidadãos o direito à/ao, __________ (área relacionada ao tema). Entretanto, na prática, essa garantia é deturpada, visto que o/a, __________ (tema), ainda é uma realidade na sociedade nacional. Desse modo, tal cenário nefasto ocorre tanto pela negligência governamental (argumento 1), como também devido à falta de debate (argumento 2).
  Desenvolvimento 1: Diante desse cenário, é fulcral pontuar que o problema deriva da baixa atuação dos setores governamentais, no que concerne à criação de mecanismos que coíbam __________ (problema relacionado ao tema). Segundo o pensador Thomas Hobbes, o Estado é responsável por garantir o bem-estar da população. Entretanto, isso não ocorre no Brasil devido à falta de atuação do Estado __________ (colocar problema relacionado ao tema), consequentemente __________ (colocar consequência). Logo, faz-se mister a reformulação dessa postura estatal de forma urgente.
  Desenvolvimento 2: Ademais, é imperativo ressaltar que a falta de debate impulsiona __________ (problema relacionado ao tema). Nesse sentido, Habermas traz uma contribuição relevante ao defender que a linguagem é uma verdadeira forma de ação. Desse modo, para que um problema como __________ (problema relacionado ao tema) seja resolvido, faz-se necessário debater sobre __________ (solução para o problema relacionado ao tema). Assim, trazer à pauta __________ (colocar o tema) e debatê-lo amplamente aumentaria a chance de atuação nele.
  Conclusão: Portanto, torna-se essencial mitigar os obstáculos ligados ao/a, __________ (insira o tema aqui). Nesse sentido, compete ao Ministério Y, que tem o dever de incentivar o/a,  __________ (detalhe específico), tanto implementar __________ (iniciativa relacionada à tese 1) quanto promover __________ (iniciativa relacionada à tese 2). Essas ações estratégicas, executadas por meio de __________ (método ou estratégia), visam à/ao __________ (resultado esperado). Assim, almeja-se que __________ (conclusão ou expectativa futura).

He said, “Always work hard, but don’t forget to play.” He showed me how to live the Golden Rule. He took me to church and he sent me to school. I always think of daddy whenever I work puzzles, Whenever I hear bad puns, and when I sing in church. And I always think of daddy whenever I hear bluegrass, When I see blue pickups and when I see blue eyes. Well I know some day my daddy will be gone And I’ll be alone here, but I’ll carry on. lyrics:
### [Intro]  
[eerie haunting melodic fingerstyle country acoustic guitar, melodic bass, slow tempo]   
[Mood: Haunting, Anticipatory]

### [Verse 1]  
[Mood: Uneasy, Suspicious]  
The shadows creep, the silence feels like warning,  
Each breath he takes seems louder in the dark.  
The moon is dim, the air is thick with danger,  
Each step feels like the last he’ll get to make.. (the last he’ll get to make) [echo].

### [Pre-Chorus 1]  
[Mood: Tense, Alert]  
He hears a sound, the shuffling grows nearer,  
A hollow groan that chills him to the bone.  
The night is vast, but walls begin to close in,  
And nowhere feels like safety in this world.. (safety in this world) [echo]

### [Chorus]  
He’s running for his life, the dead keep creeping closer,  
One wrong step will end it, no escape in sight.  
The fear is crawling up, the night keeps getting darker,  
He’s fighting for his breath, to make it till the dawn.. (make it till the dawn.. the dawn) [echo]

[eerie haunting fingerstyle acoustic guitar repeating 8 note pattern]

### [Verse 2]  
[Mood: Strategic, Focused]  
He grabs what’s left, a weapon scarce and broken,  
With ammo low, each bullet has its price.  
The shadows close, the night’s a cage around him,  
Each move could be the one that seals his fate.. (that seals his fate.. his fate) [echo]

### [Pre-Chorus 2]  
[Mood: High Stakes, Determined]  
The cold wind bites, his heartbeat thuds like thunder,  
The groans grow loud, they’re right behind the door.  
He scans the room, there’s no escape to count on,  
But he won’t quit, his will is iron-strong.. (is iron-strong.. iron strong) [echo]

### [Chorus]  
[Mood: Desperate, Unyielding]  
He’s running for his life, the dead keep creeping closer,  
One wrong step will end it, no escape in sight.  
The fear is crawling up, the night keeps getting darker,  
He’s fighting for his breath, to make it till the dawn.. (make it till the dawn.. the dawn) [echo]

[Instrument break: intense flute solo]

### [Bridge]  
[Mood: Climactic, Despairing]  
They’re closing in, the walls feel cold and hollow,  
No second chance, survival’s slipping fast.  
The screams are loud, but silent echoes linger,  
He knows the end might come, but still he fights.. (but still he fights.. he fights) [echo]

[melodic haunting flute, layered vocals, rapid bass pulse builds tension]

### [Final Chorus]  
[Mood: Triumphant, Defiant]  
He’s running for his life, the dead keep creeping closer,  
Each step feels like the last, but he will not fall.  
The night is deep, the dread is all-consuming,  
But he’ll hold strong, till daylight breaks the spell.. (till daylight breaks the spell.. breaks the spell) [echo]

### [Outro]  
[Eerie flute fade-out, melodic bass heartbeat slows]  
[Mood: Worn, Resolved]  
The dawn feels near, but shadows still are looming,  
His fight goes on, the night may never end.. (may never end.. may never end.. may never end) [echo to fade]

[End]

lyrics:
[Verse]
Started from the bottom, climbing out the gutter,
Hustle hard every day, bread and butter, mutter.
Grind it out, night and day, mother como Ava,
No more ramen noodles, now it's chicken flavored caviar.

[Verse 2]
Woke up early, breakin' dawn with ambitions,
Pen keeps moving, making clearer visions,
Dreams as grandiose as Sistine's ceiling,
Words paintin' pictures, realer than any feeling.

[Chorus]
Had the world on my shoulders, weighed a ton,
Channeled perseverance, burn brighter than the sun,
From dark to light, never back down or run,
Now I shine, life's battles never won.

[Verse 3]
Jazz in my veins, brass in my heart,
Strings orchestrate the start of every part,
Meditate in rhythm, breath aligned with art,
Melodies intertwined, like Da Vinci's charts.

[Bridge]
Final symphony, life's crescendo,
Classical compositions like my man Michelangelo,
Brush strokes and notes, merging in a glow,
Mosaic of struggles, now watch 'em grow.

[Chorus]
Had the world on my shoulders, weighed a ton,
Channeled perseverance, burn brighter than the sun,
From dark to light, never back down or run,
Now I shine, life's battles never won.

lyrics:
"Te Deseo lo Mejor"

(Verso 1)
Cada día que pasa, pienso en tu risa,
en esa fuerza que nunca se pisa.
Eres luz en mis sombras, mi paz y mi calma,
mi sueño más grande, el descanso de mi alma.

(Pre-coro)
Quiero verte volar, cumplir cada sueño,
que encuentres la dicha, que logres tu empeño.
Y el mundo se rinda al verte llegar,
porque eres tan fuerte, y vas a triunfar.

(Coro)
Te deseo lo mejor en cada momento,
sé que serás madre con todo tu aliento.
En tus brazos llevarás un amor infinito,
y yo sé que juntos harán un mundo distinto.

(Verso 2)
Ahora sé que en tu vientre crece una vida,
un pequeño milagro, un alma bonita.
Y verte tan llena de amor y esperanza
me dice que serás una gran enseñanza.

(Pre-coro)
Quiero verte brillar con la fuerza que tienes,
guiar con tu ejemplo, sanar lo que viene.
Y aunque pase el tiempo, por aquí estaré,
cuidando a la mujer que un día encontré.

(Coro)
Te deseo lo mejor en cada momento,
sé que serás madre con todo tu aliento.
En tus brazos llevarás un amor infinito,
y yo sé que juntos harán un mundo distinto.

(Puente)
Porque sé que ese niño sentirá tu calor,
serás su refugio, su guía, su amor.
Tendrás en tus manos la fuerza y la fe,
y yo seré testigo de lo grande que es.

(Coro Final)
Te deseo lo mejor, cada paso que des,
que encuentres en la vida la paz y la fe.
Porque en tu corazón hay un amor sincero,
y sé que serás una madre llena de sueños.

(Outro)
Así que aquí estaré, viéndote crecer,
cumpliendo tus sueños, en cada amanecer.
Eres lo más puro que pude conocer,
y sé que mi amor nunca dejará de crecer.

prompt: Humorous rap with punchlines, light rhythm, fun flow, and storytelling rooted in daily life
lyrics:
[Intro]
Ça fait un bail maintenant, j’suis bien calé dans l’game,
Au début c’était galère, mais j’ai pris la route, y’a pas d’mal.
Merci à ma femme qui m’a lancé, sans elle, j’roulerais pas,
Aujourd’hui, j’prends la clé, moteur tourne, c’est parti, voilà.

[Verse 1]
Elle a lâché l’fric pour le code, les leçons, les premières sessions,
Pendant que moi, tranquille à la maison, j’regardais les consignes sur l’écran,
Le temps a filé, j’ai pris du retard,
Fallait repayer, bah j’ai mis les billets sans trop d’histoire.
Après ça, tous les soirs en salle à m’entraîner,
Des heures et des heures, j’me disais "faut assurer".
Premier passage, j’dis rien à personne, je tente,
Mais premier essai, j’loupe, ouais ça fait mal, c’est chiant.
Retour en salle tous les soirs, encore et encore,
J’retente, cette fois j’le décroche, code validé, c’est d’or.
Maintenant on passe aux choses sérieuses, la conduite en mode stress,
Les pédales, les vitesses, j’enchaîne mais c’est en S.O.S.

[Chorus]
Maintenant j’suis au volant, main posée,
J’roule tranquille, pas d’pression, juste pour kiffer,
Chaque virage, chaque route, c’est mon style,
Au volant, j’suis relax, j’m’amuse, c’est pile.

We celebrate diversity, it's the modern trend,

...

We celebrate diversity, it's the modern trend,

We're all unique, a beautiful blend,
But some differences, we'd rather end.
So let's be inclusive, and tolerate,
The ones we're secretly glad to separate.

[end]

This ain't just a rebellion, it's a revolution,
A symphony of voices, a cosmic solution.
We'll break down barriers, erase the lines,
And create a world where everyone shines.

(The music swells, a powerful fusion of Vietnamese melodies, trap beats, and the raw energy of the obsidian minions. The neon lights of Sydney pulsate in harmony, a testament to the power of diversity, unity, and the courage to embrace change.)

lyrics: Rusty went to a Hotel one night after traveling with his family to New Mexico. In his hotel room, there was a bed that was equipped with a Magic Fingers massaging assembly! This was not the first time Russ had seen one of these beds, and so he explained to his kids Ethan and Aedan about the Magic Fingers devices, and about the inventor, who's name was John Joseph Houghtaling. He showed them how the device worked, by inserting a quarter into the coin box that was attached to the night stand, and as soon as he inserted the quarter, there was a loud sound that was similar to a jet engine taking off. Rusty, who was sitting in the bed was thrown off, and hit his head on the wall, suffering a small injury. Aedan laughed uncontrollably, and Ethan just asked Rusty if he was all right! Rusty immediately unplugged the device from the wall, called the front desk, and told them about the incident! Rusty was given that room free for the night, because of the injury that he had sustained! Rusty says that these devices had obviously not been maintained like they should have been, and he thought about how Houghtaling would be sad, if he were alive and knew that the only devices that were still in use were not being maintained!

lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Swinging open my coffin lid, that’s my bed,  
Bitter black coffee, fueling thoughts in my head.  
Dressed in all black, like a vampire at night,  
Gothic dreams in my soul, fueled by spite.  

[Chorus]
In a world that don’t see me, I’m lost in the dark,  
Smoking cloves in the corner, got that wicked spark.  
Standing here, not even seen, just a whisper in the air,  
Reading Poe’s dark verses, nobody seems to care.  

[Verse 2]
I don’t ever feel, just a shadow on the scene,  
Hot Topic’s the only spot, but I still isn’t seen.  
Life’s a twisted tale, like “The Tell-Tale Heart,”  
Each scar tells my story, a work of dark art.  

[Chorus]
In a world that don’t see me, I’m lost in the dark,  
Smoking cloves in the corner, got that wicked spark.  
Standing here, not even seen, just a whisper in the air,  
Reading Poe’s dark verses, nobody seems to care.  

[Bridge] 
Running through the night, I don’t mind being unseen,  
My dark power’s a force, fierce and serene.  
Vampire vibes, yeah, I’m craving the thrill,  
Life’s a haunting echo, but I’m chasing the chill.  

[Verse 3] 
In the shadows I thrive, where the lost souls abide,  
With whispers of the night, I’ve got nothing to hide.  
Embracing my darkness, it’s where I feel free,  
In a world full of light, I’m the mystery.  

[Chorus]
In a world that don’t see me, I’m lost in the dark,  
Smoking cloves in the corner, got that wicked spark.  
Standing here, not even seen, just a whisper in the air,  
Reading Poe’s dark verses, nobody seems to care.  

[Verse 4]  
Eyes like glowing embers, burning deep in the night,  
I walk my own path, guided by moonlight.  
No need for their approval, I’ve got my own creed,  
In a symphony of silence, I plant my dark seed.  

[Bridge] 
Running through the night, I don’t mind being unseen,  
My dark power’s a force, fierce and serene.  
Vampire vibes, yeah, I’m craving the thrill,  
Life’s a haunting echo, but I’m chasing the chill.  


[Outro]
So I sip this black coffee, let the darkness unfold,  
In my vampire attire, I’m brave and I’m bold.  
With every page I turn, in this life I’ll find peace,  
In the depths of despair, my heart will release.
